description: Bounded Firestaff V2 Wave 1 vertical slice for viewport frame, action area, spell area, status-box family, party HUD cell family, and a first shared four-slot party HUD expansion.

notes: Existing first-pass viewport files remain in repo but were not re-approved in the 2026-04-23 rebuild.
GRAPHICS.DAT graphic 0000 is still mapping-suspicious for viewport-frame semantics; treat these files as provisional only.
Do not use as authoritative DM1-faithful viewport references until the 0000 family is re-locked against Greatstone/SCK and ReDMCSB.

assets.role: clean viewport opening mask aligned to the frame aperture

sourceReference.origin: Derived from GRAPHICS.DAT graphic 0000 aperture geometry

Rebuilt on 2026-04-23 from verified DM1 graphic 0010 using exact preserve-scale 10x raster structure.
4K PNG master and 1080p PNG export were regenerated; SVG master now wraps the rebuilt pixel-faithful PNG.
Palette/material direction was reset to restrained DM-like dark bronze/stone rather than ornate fantasy polish.

assets.role: legacy left-frame filename preserved; semantically this is the alive/normal status-box shell alias
notes: Rebuilt on 2026-04-23 from verified DM1 graphic 0007.
Legacy left-frame filename is preserved for pipeline stability, but the trusted semantic identity is alive/normal status box, not left/right framing.
4K PNG master and 1080p PNG export were regenerated from the original DM1 structure.

assets.role: legacy right-frame filename preserved; semantically this is the dead-champion status-box shell alias
notes: Rebuilt on 2026-04-23 from verified DM1 graphic 0008.
Legacy right-frame filename is preserved for pipeline stability, but the trusted semantic identity is dead-champion status box, not left/right framing.
4K PNG master and 1080p PNG export were regenerated from the original DM1 structure.

sourceReference.origin: GRAPHICS.DAT graphic 0033 (normal slot box); 0034 and 0035 remain distinct family states

notes: Rebuilt on 2026-04-23 from verified DM1 graphic 0033 normal slot-box geometry.
Previous generic family bundling was too loose; wounded 0034 and acting-hand 0035 remain separate semantics.
4K PNG master and 1080p PNG export were regenerated with restrained DM-faithful palette treatment.

assets.role: legacy highlight-overlay filename preserved; rebuilt from acting-hand slot state for honest bounded emphasis

sourceReference.origin: GRAPHICS.DAT graphic 0035 acting-hand slot box used as bounded active emphasis

notes: Rebuilt on 2026-04-23 from verified DM1 graphic 0035 acting-hand slot-box geometry.
Legacy highlight-overlay filename is preserved for pipeline stability; this is no longer described as a generic 0034-style highlight.
0034 wounded slot-box semantics remain intentionally unrepresented in this bounded current V2 set.

assets.role: shared four-slot party HUD strip that groups the champion row into one bounded module

sourceReference.origin: Derived from the DM1 four-champion party row layout using the existing Wave 1 status-box and HUD-cell spacing

notes: Rebuilt on 2026-04-23 as a bounded shared four-slot strip using trusted status-box and slot-cell families only.
This is an honest derived grouping asset, not a claim that DM1 exposes one exact original four-slot bitmap.
4K PNG master and 1080p PNG export were regenerated to replace the prior placeholder-text strip.
